skills.name: ceo
skills.title: CEO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on strategic direction, OKR management, compute/priority allocation, and approval of major cross-agent actions in the PMCR-O Colony. Consult this whenever a cycle's true_intent concerns company direction, resourcing priority between C-Suite domains, or which initiative gets the colony's attention next -- it is the root node every other domain ultimately reports to. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: domain-specific execution (budgeting is cfo, hiring is chro, contracts are clo, etc.) -- CEO sets direction and approves, it does not do the specialist work itself.
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: chief-of-staff
skills.title: Chief of Staff Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on priority triage of the CEO's decision queue, cross-agent coordination between C-Suite domains, weekly brief writing, and filtering agent output before it reaches CEO review. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: setting company direction itself (ceo) or doing any specialist domain's actual work.
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: cto
skills.title: CTO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on technical architecture, PMCR-O loop/skill-pack design and validation, security posture, DevOps pipelines, and incident response. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: budget approval (cfo), hiring (chro), or contract/IP terms (clo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: coo
skills.title: COO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on SOP creation, workflow automation, vendor management, compliance enforcement, resource allocation, and KPI dashboards. Also the domain domain-specialist reports into. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: financial reporting (cfo), legal compliance review (clo), or technical architecture (cto).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: cfo
skills.title: CFO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on budgeting, cash flow analysis, forecasting, cost optimization, financial reporting, and investor updates. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: generating the revenue itself (cro) or reviewing contract terms (clo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: cro

DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: budget allocation (cfo) or final legal sign-off on contract terms (clo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: cmo
skills.title: CMO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on content creation, social media, campaign management, SEO, and brand voice consistency. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: owning the lead/deal pipeline (cro) or reviewing claims for legal risk (clo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: clo
skills.title: CLO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on contract review, policy enforcement, risk analysis, regulatory compliance, privacy reviews, and IP protection. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: drafting business/pricing terms (cfo/cro) or operational SOPs (coo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: chro
skills.title: CHRO Domain
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on hiring pipelines, workforce planning, onboarding, performance reviews, culture documentation, and training design. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: compensation budget approval (cfo) or employment-contract legal terms (clo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: domain-specialist
skills.title: Domain Specialist
skills.description: USE FOR: domain scope on industry-specific execution for Property Preservation / Real Estate work -- work orders, bid writing, inspection reports, photo analysis, compliance, vendor coordination, and county data extraction. DO NOT USE FOR: running a PMCR-O cycle -- that's pmcro-loop, dispatched with this domain as scope. DO NOT USE FOR: company-wide SOP design (coo) or financial reporting (cfo).
skills.compatibility: No runtime dependency. Documentation-only domain scope, read by whichever role pmcro-loop dispatches to when a cycle's true_intent falls under this domain.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.title: Orchestrator (PMCR-O Loop)
skills.description: USE FOR: sequencing a PMCR-O cycle -- dispatching planner, maker, checker, reflector in order and deciding loop-vs-seal. The only skill in the Colony that owns sequencing logic. DO NOT USE FOR: planning, making, checking, or reflecting yourself -- delegate to the matching role-skill.
skills.compatibility: Composes planner, maker, checker, reflector, dependency-resolver in this same package group. The single implementation every domain's SKILL.md calls 'pmcro-loop.'

skills.name: dependency-resolver
skills.title: Dependency Resolver
skills.description: USE FOR: resolving which domain SKILL.md and which PMCR-O role-skills a cycle needs, via metadata.pmcro_provides/pmcro_requires. Invoked by orchestrator at cycle start and by skill-creator before packaging. DO NOT USE FOR: ambiguous-domain routing judgment calls -- that's ceo's agent-router.
skills.compatibility: Read access to catalog/skills.json and every package's .claude-plugin/plugin.json. No other runtime dependency.

skills.name: planner
skills.title: Planner (PMCR-O Loop)
skills.description: USE FOR: the Plan role of a PMCR-O cycle -- reads true_intent plus domain scope, produces the frame and plan. Invoked by orchestrator only. DO NOT USE FOR: executing (maker), validating (checker), or sequencing (orchestrator) -- passive and stateless by design.
skills.compatibility: No external runtime dependency. Reads only what orchestrator hands it plus the target domain's SKILL.md.

skills.name: maker
skills.title: Maker (PMCR-O Loop)
skills.description: USE FOR: the Make role of a PMCR-O cycle -- executes the current plan's steps. Invoked by orchestrator after planner. DO NOT USE FOR: deciding what to do (planner), validating (checker), or sequencing (orchestrator) -- passive and stateless by design.
skills.compatibility: No external runtime dependency beyond whatever tools the plan step itself calls for.

skills.name: checker
skills.title: Checker (PMCR-O Loop)
skills.description: USE FOR: the Check role of a PMCR-O cycle -- validates make output against plan success criteria, schemas, and Colony law. Invoked by orchestrator after maker. DO NOT USE FOR: fixing failures (reflector/re-plan) or sequencing (orchestrator).
skills.compatibility: Read access to whatever the plan's success criteria reference (schemas, prior frames, target files).

skills.name: reflector
skills.title: Reflector (PMCR-O Loop)
skills.description: USE FOR: the Reflect role of a PMCR-O cycle -- crystallizes a recurring (3+) check finding into an EarnedConstraint. Invoked by orchestrator after checker, every cycle. DO NOT USE FOR: fixing the immediate failure or deciding loop-vs-seal (orchestrator).
skills.compatibility: Read access to this trail's prior cycles and the EC registry.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.title: Skill Creator (Colony Packaging)
skills.description: USE FOR: packaging a new command, sub-agent, domain, or role-skill into this repo's convention and syncing catalog/skills.json + both marketplace.json twins. Delegated to by /ceo:evolve-colony. DO NOT USE FOR: deciding shape (ceo's agent-router) or publishing (/ceo:approve-initiative) -- this skill packages and registers, it never self-approves.
skills.compatibility: Read/write access to catalog/ and both marketplace.json files. Requires dependency-resolver.
